description: Create a Reflected Ceiling Plan (RCP) for a 24 ft x 16 ft smart conference room. The plan must include a suspended ceiling grid, 6 Panel Lights (Troffers) in a 2x3 grid, 2 HVAC Supply Diffusers, and a dimension line for the 24' length. Include the following IT/AV equipment: a central Projector, a Motorized Screen on the 16' front wall, 2 ceiling Speakers, a WiFi Access Point labeled 'WAP-01', and an Occupancy Sensor labeled 'OCC-01'. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/conference_room_rcp.eddx and export it as an image to /home/ga/Documents/conference_room_rcp.png.
